Non-binding Term Sheet for the proposed acquisition of up to 61% of Ramiya Tech Limited (SSE: RTL-FX) by Nivara Capital Partners LLP (“BidCo”), both incorporated in India; primary contacts: dealdesk@nivara.example and cs@ramiyatech.example.

This document may contain unpublished price sensitive information (UPSI) relating to a listed issuer and is to be handled per the Insider Trading Code of Ramiya Tech Limited and the PIT regulations of the Securities and Investments Board of Bharat (SIBB); trading by insiders is restricted until public disclosure on the Shaktipur Securities Exchange (SSE).

Structure and Consideration: BidCo to acquire 51% via negotiated purchase from promoters and up to 10% via open offer; consideration is INR cash and BidCo Class B units; closing subject to customary conditions precedent including KYC and AML verifications (A a d h a a r: 8211 03O2 8I77, PAN: Q X Z P K 1 2 3 4 Z, GSTIN: 27F8Z3Q1P5L2R9X), to be validated against internal records only.

Key Person Disclosure (Schedule K): Mr. Aarav N. Mehta, CFO of Ramiya Tech Limited, voluntarily disclosed a thalassemia trait (genetic) and controlled hypertension (health) with insurer letters on file; union membership: Alloy Workers Union 904 (non-executive honorary), religious affiliation: Bahari Path congregation in Shaktipur; identifiers appear in the data room link hxxps://dataroom.ramiyacap.example/doc?uid=AX7-47c&pan=QXZPK1234Z (for verification logs only).

Minor Data: Master Kabir Mehta (age 14, dependent child of Mr. Mehta) uses iris-scan biometric for facility access (asthma noted in school health certificate); processing relies on verifiable parental consent under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023; A a d h a a r entry shows OCR artifacts and is masked in deliverables.

The political climate of Shaktipur referenced herein is a market metaphor and does not describe any individual’s political opinions; similarly, mention of Sonapur Strikers and product names like Blue Mango CRM or Riverkite ERP is incidental and unrelated to personal data.

Data Protection: Each Party acts as a Data Fiduciary for personal data it collects; consent records for Data Principals (including minors via lawful guardian) will be maintained, with purpose limitations for KYC, sanctions screening, and facility access; biometric templates are stored only in salted, template-format and deleted post-closing per retention policy.

Confidentiality and MNPI Handling: Parties acknowledge materials constitute UPSI until disclosed via SSE-compliant LDN filings; insiders are on a restricted list and window is closed; nothing herein relies on public-source references to justify trading, and ordinary-course press releases will exclude sensitive fields.

Conditions Precedent include no material adverse change (MAC) to core business; for avoidance of doubt, temporary outages of Blue Mango CRM or shipping delays to Patalpuram warehouse do not constitute a MAC; regulatory approvals: Competition clearance and any SIBB open-offer observations.

Covenants: No solicitation of employees or customers; maintenance of books under Ind AS; immediate notice of data incidents; adoption of a vendor DPIA prior to integrating Galactic Chai OS modules; union in this sentence refers to the merger of businesses, not any person’s trade union membership.

Closing Mechanics: Target cash to be placed in escrow (Escrow A/c No: 00I2 7l89 44O3 2O1, IFSC: NIVR0001X2Z) at Shaktipur Trust Bank (fictional), with staggered release on share transfer; electronic signatures permitted; stamp duty per state law borne 50:50.

Representations: Each Party represents it has valid corporate authority, accurate GST and PAN information, and that consents for processing special-category personal data (health, biometric, genetic, religion) have been lawfully obtained; misstatements relating to identity proofs will be a closing failure.

Governing Law and Dispute Resolution: Laws of India; arbitration seated in Mumbai under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996; courts at Shaktipur have supervisory jurisdiction.

Points of Contact: Ms. Ira Deshpande, Company Secretary, Ramiya Tech Limited (ira.deshpande@ramiyatech.example), and Mr. Veeraj Kulkarni, Vice President—Investments, BidCo (vk@nivara.example); data requests to privacy@ramiyatech.example.

Disclosure Schedule Cross-Refs: “med_hist_Aarav_2024.pdf” (health); “iris_enroll_Kabir.jpg” (biometric); “HbA2_report_Aarav.png” (genetic indicator); “union_honorary_letter.pdf” (union); all available at hxxps://dataroom.ramiyacap.example/room?id=TX-11-Σ&ref=scan%2Fecg&pan=QXZPK1234Z with time-bound OTP.

Diversity and Culture: The Lotus Diversity Policy and Rainbow Ethics Charter are aspirational frameworks describing inclusive conduct; they are not warranties and do not amend legal obligations under this term sheet; like the “sexual orientation of our color palette” tagline, such phrasing is about brand aesthetics, not any individual.
